verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Purify my heart Let me be as gold and precious silver Purify my heart Let me be as gold, pure gold

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Refiner's fire, My heart's one desire Is to be holy Set apart for You, Lord I choose to be holy Set apart for You, my Master Ready to do Your will

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Purify my heart Cleanse me from within And make me holy Purify my heart Cleanse me from my sin, deep within
